name: cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent
description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.

name: GammaLabTechnologies/harmonist
description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.

name: earthtojake/text-to-cad
description: An open source harness for generating CAD models

name: future-agi/future-agi
description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.

name: chekusu/wanman
description: wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts.

name: alash3al/stash
description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.

name: riverscn/intro-agentic-ai
description: 认识 Agentic AI：从神经网络到智能体

name: ovoment/ovo-local-llm
description: A private Claude-Code-style coding agent for Apple Silicon — run chat, code, and local model workflows on-device. MLX-native, Ollama/OpenAI API compatible, zero API keys.

name: chaohong-ai/ai-auto-work
description: Automatically completes the full workflow from requirement research → research review → planning → plan review → development →  development review using → test AI large language models. Capable of autonomously handling medium to large-scale engineering projects.

name: Google-Cloud-AI/agent-platform
description: A curated list of code samples and tutorials for building agents on Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform (previously Vertex AI).

name: dakshjain-1616/Qwen-Lens-Studio
description: Multimodal AI studio powered by Qwen3.6-35B-A3B. End-to-end web app exposing visual reasoning, image captioning, and document understanding tools from a single model with side-by-side output across versions.

name: Visko-Platform/VEFX-Bench
description: VEFX-Bench: A Holistic Benchmark for Generic Video Editing and Visual Effects

name: 404stillhere/upg
description: Universal Prompt Generator — prompt-engineering system for text-to-image models. Spectrum of 1–5 calibrated prompts per theme, with safety/drift/cliche enforcement built into the pipeline.

name: LibratioAI/sessa
description: Official PyTorch implementation of Sessa: Selective State Space Attention for long-context sequence modeling.
